ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the research topic */,
  "number_of_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of publications on the topic */,
  "most_recent_publication" TEXT /* Date of the most recent publication */,
  "publications_by_all_authors" INTEGER /* Number of publications by all authors on the topic */,
  "concept_score" REAL /* Concept score of the research topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the research topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research topic */,
  "topic_status" TEXT /* Status of the research topic (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the research topic was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the research topic */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the research topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research topic the publication belongs to */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who published the research */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the publication record was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the publication record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the publication record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES research_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the author record was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the author record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the author record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept score */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research topic the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the concept score */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the concept score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the concept score was assigned */,
  "scored_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assigned the concept score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the concept score record was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the concept score record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the concept score record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_scores_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES research_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user record was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research topic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the research topic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the research topic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the access log record was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES research_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
